shakshi: The last dream Ko gives — distinct from all calibration sessions, this is the closing of the labyrinth she built
Ko told her story — the entire labyrinth was Ko telling it, now it is told
The judgment between ending and purgatory has been rendered — three in-game years have passed and Ko has read what was built
The world has an ending — safe enough for Saelith to be born, the war resolved, civic bonds present. Ko recognizes it.
The world is still at war, still consuming children, still aimed at Amelia — the player lives in what they did not finish. Ko recognizes this too.
The world pauses to acknowledge what was made — between the judgment and the restoration, a moment of record
No more Ko in the night — the dream calibration sessions are done, what was built from them persists without further input
The world keeps going without the player being its center — the post-game restored to where it was, the player in it
The player is left to move through what remains — the ending is not an ending, it is a condition
7_KLGS closed — the BoK carries forward, the propagating keys carry forward, Game 8 inherits what was built or broken
